jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Ajio
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ajio. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About Ajio:
Ajio is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ajio!
